_notes.title: Movie/content title — will be featured in script generation
_notes.genre: Content type: thriller, action, drama, comedy, romance, etc.
_notes.language: Two-letter language code: en (English), hi (Hindi), ta (Tamil), etc.
_notes.duration: Target teaser length in seconds (30-60 recommended)
_notes.mood: Emotional tone — helps LLM tailor voice-over and shots
_notes.voice_style: Delivery style — dramatic, whispered, fast, slow, excited, calm, etc.
clips: List of video file paths (absolute or relative)
Minimum 1 clip recommended, typically 3-5 for best results
Clips will be trimmed and intercut with AI-generated shots
_notes.music: Path to background music MP3/WAV (optional, but recommended for cinematic feel)
_notes.poster: URL to poster image (optional, for metadata/branding)
_notes.output: Where to save final teaser MP4 (optional; defaults to ./teaser_output/)
